notes:
- Added local ASR support with FunASR integration and speech input configuration.
- Added local model capability primitives and capability-center organization for text, image generation, and OCR models.
- Improved agent/project instruction loading with hierarchical AGENTS rule resolution and Codex-compatible project instructions.
- Hardened WebUI realtime connection lifecycle, session lifetimes, and reconnect/heartbeat behavior.
- Fixed MCP connection-test ID normalization and improved workspace/tool UI status, theme control readability, and collaborator cleanup.
